The Graduation Framework
The Graduation Framework is my tried and tested way of testing ads and audiences
before I'm ready to put serious money behind them.
However what I will stress is this: Always Be Testing
Whether you use this model or not, the key to scaling is testing so that if (or more likely
when) scaling or optimising falters, you have ads and audiences ready to kick in.
I primarily use this methodology to test audiences, creatives and offers (which could just
be a product, category or promotion).
The Graduation Framework is a core concept to this entire course so do take the time to
learn and implement it.
It's about using small budgets to test the waters and then push them into a Website
Convert, Lead Gen, Mobile App or other key campaign objective when I'm ready.
In this video, learn why I use (and love) this framework for testing:
- Identifying profitable audiences with low spend
- Creating an ongoing stream of pre-tested ads ready for when you need it
- What to look out for
00:00 / 0:00
Audience Spotlighting Strategy
The 5 main areas I look at to identify new audiences for testing purposes:
- How I conduct audience testing, and why I don't jump straight into my key objective
(whether WC, Lead Gen or other)
- Splitting interests and why
- Rotating ads
- When to graduate audiences to your WC campaign with examples
Part 1 - Research
00:00 / 0:00
Warning: 'FB Audience Insights Plus' which I have used in the video above to enhance searches in
Audience Manager has gone rogue, injecting ads into your Google search for monetisation and
potentially collecting data on your Chrome activity.
I've now deactivated the plugin myself from my main profile and am currently looking for an
alternative, which I'll update in the video and here if I find one.
For now, if you do want to use the features of FB Audience Insights Plus, what I've done is to create
a new profile in Chrome without any of our other plugins or logins, install FB Audience Insights Plus
and log in to Business Manager to run audience research in Audience Insights. It will limit any
annoyance or data capture caused.
